rounds.prompt: A startup wants to pitch an AI-powered tool that helps architects design energy-efficient buildings. What does the competitive landscape look like and what market gap could they fill?
Draft a compelling narrative hook for the pitch deck — something that makes investors feel the problem before they see the solution.
What's the minimum viable technical architecture? Outline the key components, models, and data pipeline.
Now synthesize all of the above into a single 60-second elevator pitch.
